calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Miami-Dade County Public Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Miami-Dade County Public Schools is Thursday, August 14, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Miami-Dade County Public Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Miami-Dade County Public Schools is Thursday, June 4, 2026. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

yearNumbers.label: Offset Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Miami-Dade's Spring Break runs Mar 23-27, one week after Broward, Palm Beach, and Hillsborough counties (Mar 16-20) — South Florida families in mixed-district households will have staggered breaks.

yearNumbers.label: Ends in June
yearNumbers.detail: The school year ends June 4, later than most neighboring districts that conclude in late May.

yearNumbers.label: Latest Start
yearNumbers.detail: Miami-Dade starts on Thursday, August 14 — three days after Broward, Palm Beach, and Hillsborough which all open August 11.

calendarNotes: Miami-Dade County Public Schools begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 14, 2025. Spring Break runs March 23–27, 2026 — one week later than Broward County, Palm Beach County, and Hillsborough County (all March 16–20). The school year ends June 4, 2026.
